# Easton Radar

老花的信息差侦察站，按选题方向沉淀 AI 前沿、AI 实操、独立开发、跨境出海、平台流量规则和技术人现金流风险线索。

Archive: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/archive/

## Topic directions
- AI 前沿与工具链: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/topics/ai-frontier/
- AI 实操与自动化: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/topics/ai-practice/
- 跨境出海与支付: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/topics/cross-border/
- 独立开发与副业实验: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/topics/indie-builder/
- 平台规则与流量生态: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/topics/traffic-rules/
- 技术人现金流与风险避坑: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/topics/cashflow-risk/

## Analysis methods
- 深度调查: internal report_type=investigation, used only as an analysis method
- 机会拆解: internal report_type=opportunity, used only as an analysis method
- 工具账本: internal report_type=tool-ledger, used only as an analysis method
- 平台规则: internal report_type=platform-rules, used only as an analysis method
- 案例复盘: internal report_type=case-study, used only as an analysis method
- 风险避坑: internal report_type=risk-warning, used only as an analysis method

- 工具账本：DeepSeek 工具成本变化: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/items/20260609-deepseek-enters-the-fight-for-token-volume-anthr-23998cef/

- 平台规则：AWS 平台规则变化: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/items/20260609-transforming-rare-cancer-research-with-amazon-qu-e1cedddf/
- 机会拆解：Shopify 机会线索: https://radar.huadongpeng.com/items/20260609-improved-catalog-publishing-d3579117/
